title: Rate
vMinLos: Min LOS must be 1 or greater.
vRoomTypes: Pick at least one room type.
vEndDate: End date must be on or after start.
vDow: Pick at least one day of the week.
subtitle: {{rooms}} room types × {{days}} days
emptyNoPlansBody: Create a rate plan first, then set prices on the calendar.
emptyNoRoomTypesBody: Add room types during hotel setup before pricing.
legendHint: Click any cell to edit price & restrictions.
newOverrideNote: A new price will be saved as a one-day override at priority {{priority}}.
hintMinStay: Guests checking in this day must stay at least this many nights
stopSellDesc: Hide this room type from walk-in availability on this date (renovation, group blocks, overbooking cap).
ctaDesc: Can't check-in on this date. Mid-stay guests are fine.
ctdDesc: Guests can't check-out on this date — force an extra night.
bulkExplainA: This creates one rate row per selected room type covering
bulkExplainB: on the picked weekdays. Higher-priority rows already on the calendar still win.
